description: Per-run GeoParquet of OSM-derived critical-infrastructure assets scored for relative wildfire exposure. One row per asset with the full ScoredAsset provenance contract (source artefact SHA-256s, STAC item ids, config + code commit). The exposure score is a relative, AOI-normalised screening rank in [0, 1] and exposure_rank the integer position (1 = most exposed) — never a probability of fire. CRS EPSG:4326.
title: Scored critical-infrastructure assets (exposure rank)
